DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided approach minimums do not require their use.

Note.Para: Failure of the left ILS will cause the ISFD approach mode to be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 34-24-01-03.

ListItem.Para: The NO AUTOLAND ILS advisory message may be displayed.
For single ILS inoperative, the SGL SOURCE APPROACH caution message may be displayed.

Review Operations Specification requirements for route position accuracy and system availability. Consider remaining navigation and approach capability in the event of enroute failure of additional integrated navigation radio functions.
Maximum ILS approach capability is CAT I.
